steps: Ignore or archive legacy pool-first devnet accounts by retired seed prefix.
Create reserve domains before any plan, pool, or liability state.
Create domain asset vaults and ledgers per [reserve_domain, asset_mint].
Create health plans and policy series with immutable live economic semantics.
Open funding lines for sponsor budgets, premiums, and liquidity allocations.
Create liquidity pools, capital classes, and allocation positions.
Use the fixture ids below as stable demo and smoke-test anchors.

_physiotherapyModel._description: Actuarial model for post-total-hip-replacement (THR) rehabilitation coverage in Italian private clinics. All monetary amounts in EUR (1 unit = €1.00). Sources: pazienti.it, vannistrigelli.com, prontopro.it, tiassisto.it (2025-2026 market rates).

clinicalProtocol.indication: Total Hip Replacement (THR) — ICD-10: Z96.641 right / Z96.642 left

phase1_hospital.label: Surgical episode + inpatient stay
phase1_hospital.notes: Private clinic, includes OR, prosthesis, anaesthesia, inpatient physio, follow-up

phase2_rehabFacility.label: Inpatient rehabilitation facility
phase2_rehabFacility.notes: Private RSA/riabilitazione intensiva, North-Centre Italy average 2026

phase3_homeRehab.label: Home physiotherapy
phase3_homeRehab.notes: Domiciliary physio, 3 sessions/week for 5-6 weeks, national average including travel supplement

healthPlans._notes: Post-surgical rehab plan for total hip replacement in Italian private clinics. 3 phases over 90 days: 7-day hospital stay, 35-day inpatient rehab facility, 35-day home physiotherapy. Three reimbursement tiers: 50/70/100%. Actuary: 100 members, 5% utilization, 20% buffer.

Post-surgical rehab plan for total knee replacement (PTG) in Italian private clinics. 3 phases over 90 days: 7-day hospital stay, 35-day inpatient rehab facility, 35-day home physiotherapy. Total cost: 21900 EUR. Three reimbursement tiers: 50/70/100%. Actuary: 100 members, 5% utilization, 20% buffer.

Post-surgical rehab plan for Reverse Shoulder Prosthesis (Protesi Inversa di Spalla) in Italian private clinics. 3 phases over 90 days: 7-day hospital stay, 35-day inpatient rehab facility, 35-day home physiotherapy. Total cost: 22750 EUR. Key clinical constraint: strict 6-week protective phase (no active elevation). Three reimbursement tiers: 50/70/100%. Actuary: 100 members, 5% utilization, 20% buffer.

Post-stroke neurorehabilitation plan for Italian private facilities. 3 phases over 157 days (7-day acute + 75-day inpatient neurorehab + 75-day multidisciplinary home rehab). PLAN CYCLE: 180 days to cover the neuroplasticity peak window (first 6 months post-acute event). Total cost: 30220 EUR. Home phase includes PT + Speech Therapy + Occupational Therapy. Three reimbursement tiers: 50/70/100%. Actuary: 100 members, 3% utilization (vs 5% orthopedic — stroke less predictable), 20% buffer.

healthPlans.healthAlphaNote: EQ-5D-5L VAS >= 75 (Silver/Bronze) or ECOG <= 2 (Gold oncology). Attested by oracle at annual review.
healthPlans._notes: International full-coverage private health plan for working adults (25-65). Three tiers: Bronze (core hospital + emergency), Silver (comprehensive), Gold (full including oncology + maternity + medications). Currency USD. Actuary: 100-member pool, 365-day cycle. Utilization: 6% Bronze / 7% Silver / 4% Gold. Complements condition-specific Italian rehab plans.

fundingLines._notes: Sponsor seed: 18000 (basic) + 25000 (standard) + 36000 (full) = 79000. Covers 30% of expected annual payouts as initial buffer.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 178 EUR/cycle = 17800. Covers basic-50 expected payout of 11835.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 249 EUR/cycle = 24900. One active claim reserved at 16569.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 355 EUR/cycle = 35500. One claim fully settled at 23670.
LP backstop covering ~2 additional full-100% claims above expected utilization. Protects against variance spikes.
Sponsor seed: 16500 (basic) + 23000 (standard) + 33000 (full) = 72500. Covers 30% of expected annual payouts as initial buffer.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 165 EUR/cycle = 16500. Covers basic-50 expected payout of 10950.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 230 EUR/cycle = 23000. One active claim reserved at 15330.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 329 EUR/cycle = 32900. One claim fully settled at 21900.
LP backstop covering ~2 additional full-100% TKR claims (2 x 21900 = 43800) above expected utilization. Slightly smaller than THR backstop reflecting lower per-claim cost.
Sponsor seed: 17000 (basic) + 24000 (standard) + 34000 (full) = 75000. Covers 30% of expected annual payouts.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 171 EUR/cycle = 17100. Covers rsp-basic-50 expected payout of 11375.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 239 EUR/cycle = 23900. One active claim reserved at 15925.
Q1 premiums: 100 members x 342 EUR/cycle = 34200. One claim fully settled at 22750.
LP backstop covering ~2 additional full-100% RSP claims (2 x 22750 = 45500) above expected utilization.
One-time sponsor seed covering ~30% of expected annual payout across all tiers (basic 26400 + standard 37000 + full 52800 ≈ 87000 rounded).
H1 premiums: 100 members x 272 EUR/cycle = 27200. 180-day cycle, one cycle elapsed.
H1 premiums: 100 members x 381 EUR/cycle = 38100. One claim at standard tier reserved (15250 = 50% of 21154 — partial hospital phase paid, rehab facility ongoing).
H1 premiums: 100 members x 544 EUR/cycle = 54400. One full-100% claim settled at 30220.
LP backstop covering ~2 additional full-100% stroke claims (2 x 30220 = 60440) above expected utilization.
One-time sponsor seed covering 5 worst-case Gold catastrophic claims (5 x 100000 = 500000 USD). Provides pool solvency during early growth phase before premium float accumulates.

fundingLines.displayName: Full Coverage Bronze member premium line
fundingLines._notes: Annual premiums: 100 members x 1800 USD/year = 180000. Bronze tier: hospitalization, emergency, basic diagnostics, preventive care.

fundingLines.displayName: Full Coverage Silver member premium line
fundingLines._notes: Annual premiums: 100 members x 5040 USD/year = 504000. One Silver claim (arthroscopic surgery) pre-authorised and reserved at 60000 USD.

fundingLines.displayName: Full Coverage Gold member premium line
fundingLines._notes: Annual premiums: 100 members x 10000 USD/year = 1000000. One Gold oncology claim fully settled at 94500 USD (surgery 28000 + chemo 42000 + radiation 15000 + meds 9500).

fundingLines.displayName: Full Coverage Gold LP liquidity backstop
fundingLines._notes: LP backstop covering 3 additional worst-case Gold oncology/catastrophic claims (3 x 200000 = 600000 USD). Highest absolute backstop in the protocol reflecting maximum per-claim exposure.

liquidityPools.strategyThesis: Diversified health liability sleeve across sponsor-supported rewards and protection reserves.

allocationPositions._notes: LP backstop position for THR Full 100% series. 5% weight (500 bps) of open-usdc capital class. Covers variance above expected 5% utilization.
LP backstop position for TKR Full 100% series. 4% weight (400 bps) vs 5% for THR, reflecting lower per-claim cost (21900 vs 23670 EUR).
LP backstop for RSP Full 100% series. 4.5% weight (450 bps) — between TKR (400 bps) and THR (500 bps), reflecting intermediate per-claim cost of RSP (22750 EUR).
LP backstop for Stroke Full 100% series. 5% weight (500 bps) — highest weighting reflecting the highest per-claim cost (30220 EUR) and greater clinical uncertainty vs orthopedic plans. 180-day cycle.

LP backstop position for Full Coverage Gold tier. 6% weight (600 bps) — highest weighting in portfolio, reflecting the largest absolute per-claim exposure (200000 USD) and broadest risk surface across 11 coverage modules. Annual 365-day cycle.

obligations._notes: Basic-50% claim in progress. Phase 1 (hospital 50% of 18000 = 9000) paid. Phase 2+3 (rehab 50% = 2835) claimable pending final physio sessions.
Standard-70% claim recently approved, payout not yet pulled by claimant. Full 16569 EUR reserved.
Full-100% claim fully settled. All 3 phases reimbursed: surgery 18000 + rehab facility 4550 + home physio 1120 = 23670 EUR.
Basic-50% TKR claim in progress. Phase 1 (hospital 50% of 16000 = 8000) paid. Phase 2+3 (rehab facility + home physio 50% = 2950) claimable pending completion of home physio sessions.
Standard-70% TKR claim approved, payout not yet pulled. Oxford Knee Score >= 34 confirmed by oracle. Full 15330 EUR reserved.
Full-100% TKR claim settled. All 3 phases reimbursed: surgery 16000 + rehab facility 4550 + home physio 1350 = 21900 EUR. OKS 38/48 attested by oracle.

Basic-50% RSP claim in progress. Phase 1 (hospital 50% of 17000 = 8500) paid. Phase 2+3 (rehab facility + home physio 50% = 2875) claimable pending completion of home physio. Patient still in protective sling phase.
Standard-70% RSP claim approved, payout not yet pulled. Constant-Murley Score >= 70 confirmed by oracle. Full 15925 EUR reserved.
Full-100% RSP claim settled. All 3 phases reimbursed: surgery 17000 + rehab facility 4550 + home physio 1200 = 22750 EUR. CMS 76/100 attested by oracle.
Basic 50% stroke claim partially paid. Acute hospital phase settled (7555 EUR = 50% of 15110). Neuro-rehab facility phase (days 8-82) claimable, pending Barthel re-assessment at day 90.
Standard 70% stroke obligation reserved. Claim approved; 180-day neuroplasticity window in progress. Full amount (21154 EUR) reserved pending phased milestone attestations.
Full 100% stroke claim fully settled. All 3 phases: acute hospital 11000 + neuro-rehab facility 15000 + home PT/SLT/OT 4220 = 30220 EUR. Barthel Index 82/100 at day 180 attested by oracle.

Bronze partial claim: acute appendicitis. Emergency visit + laparoscopic appendectomy settled 4500 USD. Post-op imaging and follow-up diagnostics (2200 USD) claimable pending discharge summary oracle attestation.

Silver obligation reserved at full cap: arthroscopic knee surgery (ACL reconstruction + meniscus repair) pre-authorised. Treatment scheduled — full 60000 USD reserved pending surgical outcome attestation.

Gold oncology claim fully settled. Stage 2 breast cancer treatment: surgery 28000 + chemotherapy x6 cycles 42000 + radiation therapy 15000 + targeted therapy/medications 9500 = 94500 USD. ECOG 1 at end of treatment attested by oracle.

claimCases._notes: 50% reimbursement. Hospital phase paid (9000). Rehab facility + home physio portions (2835) approved and claimable. ICD-10: Z96.641, CPT: 27447/97110/97530/97140.
70% reimbursement. Claim approved, pending claimant payout pull. Harris Hip Score >= 80 confirmed by oracle. Total 16569 EUR reserved.
100% reimbursement fully settled. Surgery 18000 + rehab facility 4550 + home physio 1120 = 23670 EUR paid. Outcome attested: HHS 86/100.
50% TKR reimbursement. Hospital phase paid (8000). Rehab facility + home physio portions (2950) approved and claimable. ICD-10: Z96.651, CPT: 27447/97110/97530/97140/97035.
70% TKR reimbursement. Claim approved, awaiting payout pull. OKS >= 34 confirmed by oracle. 15330 EUR reserved. ICD-10: Z96.651, CPT: 27447/97110/97530/97140.
100% TKR reimbursement fully settled. Surgery 16000 + rehab facility 4550 + home physio 1350 = 21900 EUR paid. OKS 38/48 attested by oracle.
50% RSP reimbursement. Hospital phase paid (8500). Rehab facility + home physio portions (2875) claimable. ICD-10: Z96.611, CPT: 23472/97110/97530/97140/97014.
70% RSP reimbursement. Claim approved, awaiting payout pull. CMS >= 70 confirmed by oracle. 15925 EUR reserved. ICD-10: Z96.611, CPT: 23472/97110/97530/97140.
100% RSP reimbursement fully settled. Surgery 17000 + rehab facility 4550 + home physio 1200 = 22750 EUR paid. CMS 76/100 attested by oracle.
Basic 50% stroke claim partially paid. Acute phase (hospital 7d) reimbursed at 7555 EUR. Neuro-rehab facility phase pending oracle Barthel attestation at day 90 milestone.

Standard 70% stroke claim approved, full amount reserved. Neuroplasticity rehabilitation programme active — 3 discipline home rehab (PT + SLT + OT) in progress. Payout gated on Barthel ≥75 at 180-day oracle attestation.

Full 100% stroke claim settled. Acute hospital 11000 + neuro-rehab facility 15000 + multidisciplinary home rehab 4220 (PT 2100 + SLT 1280 + OT 840) = 30220 EUR paid. Barthel Index 82/100 at day 180 confirmed by oracle.

Bronze partial claim: acute appendicitis. ER visit + laparoscopic appendectomy paid 4500 USD. Post-op follow-up diagnostics 2200 USD claimable — awaiting oracle attestation of discharge summary and imaging results.

Silver claim approved and reserved at annual cap. ACL reconstruction + meniscus repair pre-authorised at 60000 USD. Surgery date confirmed — payout gated on post-operative outcome attestation by treating surgeon oracle.

Gold oncology claim fully settled. Stage 2 breast cancer: surgery 28000 + chemotherapy 42000 + radiation 15000 + targeted therapy/meds 9500 = 94500 USD paid. ECOG Performance Status 1 confirmed at treatment completion. healthAlphaScore 8000 attested.
